subcodes.first_line: O Yunus, thou who art of the ocean of intimacy! Service to the Cause of God today is to foster love and fellowship amongst the beloved of God. Thou must, with utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یونس دریای انس خدمت امرالله الیوم الفت و محبت احباء الله است باید در کمال
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
